sizing_rule.note: Risk a fixed 6.5% per trade with protective stop loss. Target average loss 5-6% over time, with individual losses kept between 5-8%. Uses 1R concept with fixed fractional risk per trade.

source_rule_text: A trader should exit a position using a protective stop loss set at a maximum tolerable loss percentage, with the goal of keeping individual losses between 5-8% and averaging all losses around 5-6% over time.
